creator: hyama99@gmail.com
text:
I am using a jp.106 type USB keyboard.
In jp.106 keymap, key code 125 is assigned to backslash.
When 12.1-STABLE starts, this key code 125 is not recognized.
However when 11.1 RC3 starts, this key code is recognized and 
I can type backslash and pipe key by keyboard. 
It seems that a degrade happens.
